sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54022" key="kata/qrausis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατά-θραυσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n54022.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">breaking up</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ φλέγματος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:1:176D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.176D.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
